purpose: Fetch every KC form in a binder + the clientGuid lookup.

result.clientId: kcClientId (KC internal int — DIFFERENT from Axcess clientId)
result.clientGuid: per-client GUID — needed for DELETE form endpoint
result.lastUsedTitleGuid: titleId for the industry title in use

use_cases: Look up clientGuid for delete-form workflows
Inventory the binder for bulk-capture or audit
